user.title: Amazon Kids Parent Controls
user.description: Enter credentials harvested from a logged-in parents.amazon.com browser session. See the README for how to obtain these. Treat them like a password.

error.children_not_json: Children field is not valid JSON.
error.children_empty: Provide at least one child as a JSON list.
error.children_shape: Each child needs a 'name' and a 'directed_id'.
